insight: DRL architect decomposition: 7 domain epics + 1 IV is the right granularity for a pnpm CLI tool that is primarily a template package with a thin Go wrapper. The Go binary fork is foundation (blocks all), template content (skills, agents, commands) forms the bulk of novel work. Advisory fleet unanimously flagged: define inter-epic contracts upfront (agent names, skill paths, phase names, hook events) to enable parallel development.

DRL distribution: ship Go binary via PyPI (Python wheels) instead of pnpm (npm). Researchers have Python, not Node.js. Same pattern as ruff/uv (Rust binaries on PyPI). Go binary unchanged, only packaging wrapper is Python. User confirmed this decision 2026-04-02.
